goal: Stop fake-progress churn during active measurement holds by reusing the current skip artifact when hold truth is unchanged.
findings: The current hold window already had repeated measurement_hold_skip logs inside the same unchanged review window.
distribution_lane_latest.md says there is no truthful do-now packet before 2026-05-26T20:55:18, so extra skip logs add noise instead of improving odds of adoption movement.
changes: Added run._latest_measurement_hold_skip_log() to locate a matching skip artifact in the same active hold window.
Changed run._write_measurement_hold_skip_log() to reuse that artifact when source_log and hold_until still match.
Added regression tests for reuse-on-same-window and rewrite-on-truth-change behavior.
expected_outcome: Active hold windows stop generating duplicate skip artifacts unless the hold truth materially changes.
measurement_window: Next active measurement-hold run inside the same hold window.
